name: order-mobile
description: Order mobile shell for Android and iOS.

scripts.android: cmd /c if exist android\build\generated\autolinking rmdir /s /q android\build\generated\autolinking && set ANDROID_HOME=%LOCALAPPDATA%\Android\Sdk&& set ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=%LOCALAPPDATA%\Android\Sdk&& react-native run-android
scripts.build:apk: cmd /c if exist android\build\generated\autolinking rmdir /s /q android\build\generated\autolinking && set ANDROID_HOME=%LOCALAPPDATA%\Android\Sdk&& set ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=%LOCALAPPDATA%\Android\Sdk&& cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.build:ios: xcodebuild -workspace ios/ControlerApp.xcworkspace -scheme ControlerApp -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos -derivedDataPath ios/build

author: Order contributors
